sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102292" key="tanahxe/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τᾰνᾰ-ηχέτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n102292.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">far-sounding</tr_>, poet. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ηχέτα</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:144" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.144</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
